req.title: Allergy intolerance (negative)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an AllergyIntolerance linked to the patient; subsequent MedicationRequests shall warn on conflict. Negative paths including permission denial, missing mandatory elements, and conflicting state transitions must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers AllergyIntolerance creation on /AllergyIntolerance with a clinician role, subsequent MedicationRequest conflict alerting, and explicit negative paths (permission denial, missing mandatory elements, duplicate 409). I selected: (1) EP positive – valid full payload succeeds and allergy is stored; (2) NEG – non-clinician role receives 403; (3) NEG – missing mandatory 'code' field returns 422; (4) STC – duplicate submission transitions to 409 conflict; (5) BVA – code.text at exactly max allowed length (255 chars) is accepted. These cover the five cited heuristics and satisfy the positive/negative/boundary minimum.

tests.name: test_create_allergy_intolerance_valid_payload
preconditions: No prior AllergyIntolerance for this patient/substance pair
actions: POST /AllergyIntolerance with a complete, valid FHIR R4 AllergyIntolerance body referencing the patient

tests.name: test_create_allergy_intolerance_denied_non_clinician
actions: POST /AllergyIntolerance with a valid FHIR R4 AllergyIntolerance body using patient-role token
expected: Response body contains error indicating insufficient permissions

tests.name: test_create_allergy_intolerance_missing_mandatory_code
actions: POST /AllergyIntolerance with payload omitting the mandatory 'code' element
expected: Response body describes validation failure referencing 'code' element
trace: R-HLT-059: error pathway – missing mandatory elements
FHIR R4 constraint: AllergyIntolerance.code is mandatory

tests.name: test_create_allergy_intolerance_duplicate_returns_409
preconditions: An identical AllergyIntolerance (same patient + substance code) already exists (seeded by <seed_allergy_intolerance>)
actions: POST /AllergyIntolerance with a payload identical to the pre-existing resource
expected: Response body indicates duplicate resource conflict
trace: R-HLT-059: error pathway – 409 when exact duplicate

tests.name: test_create_allergy_intolerance_code_text_at_max_length
preconditions: System maximum for code.text is 255 characters
actions: POST /AllergyIntolerance with code.text set to exactly 255 characters
trace: R-HLT-059: allergy stored – boundary value of mandatory code.text field
BVA: on-point at upper boundary of string field
